---
title: "ATTEMPT Plasma SOMA Scan Analysis"
author: "Ye Ji Choi and Laura Pyle"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 5
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: true
    embed-resources: true
    message: false
    warning: false
---

```{r echo = F, include = F}
# load required packages
library(jsonlite)
library(aws.s3)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(knitr)
library(ensr)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggrepel)
library(purrr)
library(tidyverse)
library(limma)
library(arsenal)
library(fgsea)
library(correlation)
library(psych)
library(openxlsx)
library(SomaPlotr)
library(lme4)
library(lmerTest)
library(here)

# source shared ATTEMPT analysis functions (from this repository)
source(here("attempt_functions.R"))

# NOTE: correlation_function.R is available in the main CHCO-Code repository
# source("correlation_function.R")

# set paths for data inputs and results outputs
bg_path <- file.path(root_path, "GSEA")
load(file.path(root_path, "KNIGHT/Somalogic data/analytes.Rdata"))

# load urine creatinine sample manifest
urine_creat <- read.xlsx(file.path(root_path, 'ATTEMPT/Data Raw/Urine Proteomics Sample Manifest Jun 25 2025.xlsx'), sheet = "Working")
names(urine_creat) <- c("position", "record_id", "visit", "box", "creatinine_u_proteomics", "comments")
# load SomaScan analyte annotation metadata
load(file.path(root_path, "Data Harmonization/Combined SomaScan/analytes_2.Rdata"))

```

```{r include = F}
# configure S3 connection to Kopah (UW research storage)
# NOTE: users must provide their own keys.json with AWS credentials
keys <- fromJSON(Sys.getenv("ATTEMPT_KEYS_PATH", unset = "keys.json"))

Sys.setenv(
  "AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID" = keys$MY_ACCESS_KEY,
  "AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY" = keys$MY_SECRET_KEY,
  "AWS_DEFAULT_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_REGION" = "",
  "AWS_S3_ENDPOINT" = "s3.kopah.uw.edu"
)
```


```{r echo = F}
# load harmonized SomaScan dataset and filter to ATTEMPT study
harm_dat_raw <- read.csv(file.path(root_path, "Data Harmonization/Data Clean/soma_harmonized_dataset.csv"), na.strings = "")

# collapse duplicate record_id/visit rows and add race/ethnicity categories
attempt_redcap <- harm_dat_raw %>% filter(study == "ATTEMPT") %>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(where(negate(is.numeric)), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_character_, last(na.omit(.x)))),
                   across(where(is.numeric), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_real_, mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))),
                   .by = c(record_id, visit)) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(race_ethnicity_condensed = case_when(race == "White" &
                                                       ethnicity == "Not Hispanic or Latino" ~ "Not Hispanic or Latino White",
                                                     race == "Black or African American" &
                                                       ethnicity == "Not Hispanic or Latino" ~ "Not Hispanic or Latino Black",
                                                     ethnicity == "Hispanic or Latino" ~ "Hispanic or Latino",
                                                     T ~ "Not Hispanic or Latino Other")) %>%
  arrange(record_id) %>%
  dplyr::select(-hba1c, -starts_with("seq."))

# subset Denver site participants and recode visits to numeric weeks
attempt_redcap_denver <- attempt_redcap %>%
  filter(grepl("^3", record_id)) %>%
  mutate(visit = case_when(visit == "baseline" ~ 0,
                           visit == "4_weeks_post" ~ 4,
                           visit == "4_months_post" ~ 16,
                           visit == "screening"  ~ -4,
                           visit == "follow_up" ~ 18),
         record_id = as.integer(record_id)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-c(ethnicity, bmi, gfr_raw_plasma, gfr_bsa_plasma, date, sex, mri_date, PWV,
                   creatinine_s, cystatin_c_s, temp, pulse, height, avg_c_r2, avg_k_r2, 
                   sbp, dbp, hct, age, weight)) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(avg_c_t1 = mean(c(t1_r_cortex, t1_l_cortex), na.rm = T),
         avg_k_t1 = mean(c(t1_r_kidney, t1_l_kidney), na.rm = T),
         tkv = (volume_left + volume_right)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::rename(subject_id = record_id)

# clinical dataset from Antoine (merged version)
attempt_dat <- s3readRDS("Clinical Data/ATTEMPT_AC.RDS", "attempt", region = "")
attempt_dat[attempt_dat == ""] <- NA
attempt_dat <- attempt_dat %>%
  filter(visit %in% c("baseline", "4_weeks_post", "4_months_post", "screening", "follow_up")) %>%
  mutate(visit = case_when(visit == "baseline" ~ 0,
                           visit == "4_weeks_post" ~ 4,
                           visit == "4_months_post" ~ 16,
                           visit == "screening"  ~ -4,
                           visit == "follow_up" ~ 18),
         record_id = as.integer(record_id)) %>%
  dplyr::rename(subject_id = record_id,
                treatment = treatment_arm)

# extract IDs with biopsy
attempt_clean_so_metadata <- s3readRDS("cleaned_data/attempt_clean_so_metadata.rds", "attempt", region = "")
attempt_biopsy_yn <- attempt_clean_so_metadata %>%
  dplyr::select(subject_id, visit) %>%
  distinct(subject_id, visit, .keep_all = T) %>%
  mutate(visit = case_when(visit == "PRE" ~ 0,
                           visit == "POST" ~ 16),
         biopsy_yn = "Yes")
attempt_biopsy_yn <- attempt_biopsy_yn %>%
  rbind(attempt_biopsy_yn %>%
          filter(visit == 0) %>%
          mutate(visit = -4))

# merge REDCap version (for Denver) and dataset from Antoine, flag biopsy status
attempt_dat <- left_join(attempt_dat, attempt_redcap_denver) %>%
  left_join(attempt_biopsy_yn) %>%
  mutate(biopsy_yn = case_when(biopsy_yn == "Yes" ~ "Yes",
                               T ~ "No"))
attempt_dat$treatment <- factor(attempt_dat$treatment, levels = c("Placebo", "Dapagliflozin 5mg"))
```

```{r echo = F}
# prepare harmonized data for proteomics: collapse rows, recode visits, keep baseline and 4-month
harm_dat <- harm_dat_raw %>%
  filter(study == "ATTEMPT") %>%
  dplyr::summarise(across(where(negate(is.numeric)), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_character_, last(na.omit(.x)))),
                   across(where(is.numeric), ~ ifelse(all(is.na(.x)), NA_real_, mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE))),
                   .by = c(record_id, visit)) %>%
  mutate(visit = case_when(visit == "baseline" ~ 0,
                           visit == "4_weeks_post" ~ 4,
                           visit == "4_months_post" ~ 16,
                           visit == "screening"  ~ -4,
                           visit == "follow_up" ~ 18),
         record_id_visit = paste0(record_id, "_", visit),
         treatment_arm = case_when(treatment_arm == "Placebo" ~ "Placebo",
                                   T ~ "Dapagliflozin")) %>%
  filter(visit %in% c(0, 16))

# filter to samples with SomaScan data and exclude serum mix-ups (low urine creatinine)
soma <- harm_dat %>%
  filter(!is.na(seq.10030.8)) %>%
  filter(urine_creat_proteomics > 1)

soma$visit <- factor(soma$visit, levels = c(0, 16), label = c("PRE", "POST"))
```

# SOMA

```{r echo = F, results='asis'}
# descriptive table of demographics by visit and treatment arm
summary(arsenal::tableby(visit ~ age + sex + bmi + diabetes_duration,
                         data = soma, strata = treatment_arm), test = F, 
        labelTranslations = c("age" = "Age", "sex" = "Sex", "acr_u" = "UACR", 
                              "bmi" = "BMI", "diabetes_duration" = "Diabetes duration"))
```

## Placebo
```{r echo = F}
# fit limma within-treatment model for placebo group (PRE vs POST)
placebo_res_plasma <- run_limma_proteomics(data = soma,
                                           analyte_info = analytes_attempt,
                                           treatment = "Placebo",
                                           feature_suffix = "",
                                           model_type = "within_treatment")
```

```{r echo = F}
# volcano plots for placebo group (raw and adjusted p-values)
plot_volcano_proteomics(data = placebo_res_plasma$results_annotated, fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "P.Value",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC",
                        y_axis = "-log10(p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive after placebo treatment",
                        negative_text = "Negative after placebo treatment",
                        formula = "visit",
                        file_suffix = "_placebo_plasma_proteomics")
plot_volcano_proteomics(data = placebo_res_plasma$results_annotated, fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "adj.P.Val",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC", 
                        y_axis = "-log10(adj.p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive after placebo treatment",
                        negative_text = "Negative after placebo treatment",
                        formula = "visit",
                        file_suffix = "_placebo_plasma_proteomics_adjp")
```

## Dapagliflozin
```{r echo = F}
# fit limma within-treatment model for dapagliflozin group (PRE vs POST)
dapa_res_plasma <- run_limma_proteomics(data = soma,
                                        analyte_info = analytes_attempt,
                                        treatment = "Dapagliflozin",
                                        feature_suffix = "",
                                        model_type = "within_treatment")
```

```{r echo = F}
# volcano plots for dapagliflozin group (raw and adjusted p-values)
plot_volcano_proteomics(data = dapa_res_plasma$results_annotated, fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "P.Value",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC",
                        y_axis = "-log10(p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive after dapagliflozin treatment",
                        negative_text = "Negative after dapagliflozin treatment",
                        formula = "visit",
                        file_suffix = "_dapa_plasma_proteomics")
plot_volcano_proteomics(data = dapa_res_plasma$results_annotated, fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "adj.P.Val",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC", 
                        y_axis = "-log10(adj.p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive after dapagliflozin treatment",
                        negative_text = "Negative after dapagliflozin treatment",
                        formula = "visit",
                        file_suffix = "_dapa_plasma_proteomics_adjp")
```

## PRE (Placebo vs. Dapa)
```{r echo = F}
# fit limma cross-sectional model comparing treatment arms at baseline
pre_res_plasma <- run_limma_proteomics(data = soma,
                                       analyte_info = analytes_attempt,
                                       visit = "PRE",
                                       feature_suffix = "",
                                       model_type = "within_visit")
```

```{r echo = F}
# volcano plots for baseline treatment comparison (raw and adjusted p-values)
plot_volcano_proteomics(data = pre_res_plasma$results_annotated, fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "P.Value",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC",
                        y_axis = "-log10(p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive in dapagliflozin\ncompared to placebo (at baseline)",
                        negative_text = "Negative in dapagliflozin\ncompared to placebo (at baseline)",
                        formula = "treatment",
                        file_suffix = "_pre_plasma_proteomics")
plot_volcano_proteomics(data = pre_res_plasma$results_annotated, fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "adj.P.Val",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC", 
                        y_axis = "-log10(adj.p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive in dapagliflozin\ncompared to placebo (at baseline)",
                        negative_text = "Negative in dapagliflozin\ncompared to placebo (at baseline)",
                        formula = "treatment",
                        file_suffix = "_pre_plasma_proteomics_adjp")
```

## POST (Placebo vs. Dapa)
```{r echo = F}
# fit limma cross-sectional model comparing treatment arms at follow-up
post_res_plasma <- run_limma_proteomics(data = soma,
                                        analyte_info = analytes_attempt,
                                        visit = "POST",
                                        feature_suffix = "",
                                        model_type = "within_visit")
```

```{r echo = F}
# volcano plots for follow-up treatment comparison (raw and adjusted p-values)
plot_volcano_proteomics(data = post_res_plasma$results_annotated, fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "P.Value",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC",
                        y_axis = "-log10(p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive in dapagliflozin\ncompared to placebo (at follow-up)",
                        negative_text = "Negative in dapagliflozin\ncompared to placebo (at follow-up)",
                        formula = "treatment",
                        file_suffix = "_post_plasma_proteomics")
plot_volcano_proteomics(data = post_res_plasma$results_annotated, fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "adj.P.Val",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC", 
                        y_axis = "-log10(adj.p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive in dapagliflozin\ncompared to placebo (at follow-up)",
                        negative_text = "Negative in dapagliflozin\ncompared to placebo (at follow-up)",
                        formula = "treatment",
                        file_suffix = "_post_plasma_proteomics_adjp")
```

# DiD
```{r echo = F}
# fit limma DiD interaction model (fixed effects) for plasma proteomics
did_res_plasma <- run_limma_proteomics(data = soma,
                                       analyte_info = analytes_attempt,
                                       feature_suffix = "",
                                       model_type = "interaction")

# fit limma DiD mixed model with random intercept per subject
did_res_plasma_mixed <- run_limma_proteomics(data = soma,
                                             analyte_info = analytes_attempt,
                                             feature_suffix = "",
                                             model_type = "interaction_random")
# save mixed model DiD results to S3 and local CSV
s3saveRDS(did_res_plasma_mixed, "Proteomics/plasma_proteomics_res.RDS", "attempt", region = "")
write.csv(did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated, file.path(results_dir, "Somascan/plasma_proteomics_res.csv"), row.names = F)
```

```{r echo = F}
# volcano plots for DiD fixed-effects model (raw and adjusted p-values)
plot_volcano_proteomics(data = did_res_plasma$results_annotated,
                        fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "P.Value",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC",
                        y_axis = "-log10(p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive DiD",
                        negative_text = "Negative DiD",
                        formula = "treatment:visit",
                        file_suffix = "_DiD_plasma_proteomics")

plot_volcano_proteomics(data = did_res_plasma$results_annotated,
                        fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "adj.P.Val",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC", 
                        y_axis = "-log10(adj.p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive DiD",
                        negative_text = "Negative DiD",
                        formula = "treatment:visit",
                        file_suffix = "_DiD_plasma_proteomics_adjp")

# volcano plots for DiD mixed model (raw and adjusted p-values)
plot_volcano_proteomics(data = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,
                        fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "P.Value",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC",
                        y_axis = "-log10(p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive DiD",
                        negative_text = "Negative DiD",
                        formula = "treatment:visit + (1|subject)",
                        file_suffix = "_DiD_plasma_proteomics_mixed")

plasma_volcano <- plot_volcano_proteomics(data = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,
                        fc = "logFC",
                        p_col = "adj.P.Val",
                        title = NULL,
                        x_axis = "LogFC", 
                        y_axis = "-log10(adj.p-value)",
                        positive_text = "Positive DiD",
                        negative_text = "Negative DiD",
                        formula = "treatment:visit + (1|subject)",
                        file_suffix = "_DiD_plasma_proteomics_adjp_mixed")
```

```{r echo = F}
# pivot DiD mixed model results to wide format and filter to nominal sig for heatmap
res_full_wide <- did_res_plasma_mixed$results_full %>%
  dplyr::select(-effect) %>%
  # Pivot wider, creating columns for each term's statistics
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c(AptName, SeqId, EntrezGeneSymbol, Target),  # Keep these as row identifiers
    names_from = term,
    values_from = c(logFC, std.error, statistic, df, P.Value, adj.P.Val),
    names_glue = "{term}_{.value}"  # Format: term_statistic
  ) %>%
  mutate(EntrezGeneSymbol = case_when(EntrezGeneSymbol == "" ~ Target, T ~ EntrezGeneSymbol),
         Gene_seq = paste0(EntrezGeneSymbol, " (", SeqId, ")")) %>%
  filter(`treatment_armDapagliflozin:visitPOST_P.Value` < 0.05)

# create heatmap of top 20 DiD proteins and combine with volcano into panel figure
plasma_heatmap <- plot_treatment_heatmap(data = res_full_wide,
                       p_col = "P.Value",
                       top_n = 20,
                       logfc_col = "treatment_armDapagliflozin:visitPOST_logFC",
                       fdr_col = "treatment_armDapagliflozin:visitPOST_adj.P.Val",
                       logfc_visit = "visitPOST_logFC",
                       gene_col = "Gene_seq",
                       heatmap_caption = F)

ggarrange(plasma_volcano, plasma_heatmap, widths = c(2,1), labels = "AUTO")
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Panels/plasma_proteomics_panel.png"), width = 10, height = 6)
```
## GSEA (fgsea)

```{r echo = F}
# run fgsea pathway enrichment on DiD mixed model results
soma_DiD_fgsea <- run_fgsea_analysis(bg_path = bg_path,
                                     results_annotated = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,
                                     stat_col = "statistic")
soma_DiD_fgsea$summary
```

```{r echo = F}
# plot top 30 enriched pathways for each gene set (KEGG, REACTOME, GO)
plot_fgsea_transpose(soma_DiD_fgsea$kegg,
                     title = "SOMA DiD Top 30 KEGG",
                     xmax = 30)
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Pathways/plasma_SOMA_DiD_KEGG.png"),
       width = 27.5, height = 14, scale = 1)
# REACTOME
plot_fgsea_transpose(soma_DiD_fgsea$reactome, 
                     title = "SOMA DiD Top 30 REACTOME", 
                     xmax = 30)
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Pathways/plasma_SOMA_DiD_REACTOME.png"),
       width = 27.5, height = 14, scale = 1)
# GO
plot_fgsea_transpose(soma_DiD_fgsea$go, 
                     title = "SOMA DiD Top 30 GO", 
                     xmax = 30)
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Pathways/plasma_SOMA_DiD_GO.png"),
       width = 27.5, height = 14, scale = 1)
```

## Integrate transcriptomics

```{r echo = F}
# read in nebula scRNA-seq DiD results for each cell type from S3
celltypes <- c("EC", "POD", "FIB/VSMC/P", "Immune")

# load full gene set results (not limited to 2000 HVG)
for (cell in celltypes)  {
  input_path <- paste0(cell,"/nebula/",tolower(cell),"_attempt_nebula_res_reml_pooled.rds")
  cell_df <- s3readRDS(input_path, bucket = "attempt", region = "")
  processed <- process_nebula_results(cell_df)
  lower_cell <- tolower(cell)
  var_name <- paste0(lower_cell, "_nebula_res_combined_reml_pooled")
  
  assign(var_name, processed$results)
}

# filter to nominally significant DiD proteins
plasma_did_sig <- did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated %>%
  filter(P.Value < 0.05)

# compute PRE-to-POST deltas for creatinine-adjusted proteins
plasma_delta <- soma %>%
  select(record_id, visit, treatment_arm, starts_with(pt_map$AptName) & ends_with("cradj")) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = visit,
    values_from = starts_with("seq"),
    names_glue = "{.value}_{visit}"
  ) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with("_POST"), 
                ~ . - get(sub("_POST$", "_PRE", cur_column())),
                .names = "delta_{.col}")) %>%
  select(record_id, treatment_arm, starts_with("delta_"))

s3saveRDS(plasma_delta, "Proteomics/plasma_cradj_proteomics_delta.RDS", "attempt", region = "")
```

```{r echo = F}
# map overlapping sig genes between scRNA DiD and plasma proteomics DiD per cell type
walk(celltypes, function(ct) {

  nebula_obj <- get(paste0(tolower(ct), "_nebula_res_combined_reml_pooled"))

  sig <- nebula_obj %>%
    filter(`p_treatmentDapagliflozin:visitPOST` < 0.05)

  map <- analytes_info %>%
    filter(EntrezGeneSymbol %in% unique(sig$Gene[sig$Gene %in% plasma_did_sig$EntrezGeneSymbol])) %>%
    select(Target, TargetFullName, AptName, EntrezGeneSymbol)

  write.csv(map,
            file.path(results_dir, "Somascan", paste0(ct, "_plasma_proteomics_map.csv")),
            row.names = FALSE, na = "")
})
```

## Correlations with clinical variables

### mGFR

```{r echo = F, warning=FALSE, quiet = TRUE}
# correlate plasma protein deltas with change in mGFR
plasma_soma_mgfr <- soma_corr(
  clinical_raw = attempt_dat,
  soma_raw     = soma,
  did_df       = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,
  analytes_info= analytes_attempt,
  clinical_var = "mgfr_jodal",
  feature_suffix = "",
  proper_name = "\u0394 mGFR",
  pre_visit = -4
)

# correlation table
plasma_soma_mgfr$correlation_table

# plots
plasma_soma_mgfr$plot_all
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/Correlations/volcano_mixed_spearman_plasma_mgfr.png"),
       plasma_soma_mgfr$plot_all, width = 10, height = 7)
```

### mGFR adjusted

```{r echo = F, warning=FALSE}
# correlate plasma protein deltas with change in BSA-adjusted mGFR
plasma_soma_mgfr_adj <- soma_corr(
  clinical_raw = attempt_dat,
  soma_raw     = soma,
  did_df       = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,
  analytes_info= analytes_attempt,
  clinical_var = "mgfr_jodal_bsa",
  feature_suffix = "",
  proper_name = "\u0394 mGFR (BSA)",
  pre_visit = -4
)

# correlation table
plasma_soma_mgfr_adj$correlation_table

# plots
plasma_soma_mgfr_adj$plot_all
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/Correlations/volcano_mixed_spearman_plasma_mgfr_bsa.png"),
       plasma_soma_mgfr_adj$plot_all, width = 10, height = 7)
```

### HbA1c

```{r echo = F, warning=FALSE}
# correlate plasma protein deltas with change in HbA1c
plasma_soma_hba1c <- soma_corr(
  clinical_raw = attempt_dat,
  soma_raw     = soma,
  did_df       = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,
  analytes_info= analytes_attempt,
  clinical_var = "hba1c",
  feature_suffix = "",
  proper_name = "\u0394 HbA1c"
)

# correlation table
plasma_soma_hba1c$correlation_table

# plots
plasma_soma_hba1c$plot_all
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/Correlations/volcano_mixed_spearman_plasma_hba1c.png"),
       plasma_soma_hba1c$plot_all, width = 10, height = 7)
```

### TIR

```{r echo = F, warning=FALSE}
# correlate plasma protein deltas with change in CGM time-in-range
plasma_soma_tir <- soma_corr(
  clinical_raw = attempt_dat,
  soma_raw     = soma,
  did_df       = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,
  analytes_info= analytes_attempt,
  clinical_var = "cgm_tir",
  feature_suffix = "",
  proper_name = "\u0394 TIR"
)

# correlation table
plasma_soma_tir$correlation_table

# plots
plasma_soma_tir$plot_all
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/Correlations/volcano_mixed_spearman_plasma_tir.png"),
       plasma_soma_tir$plot_all, width = 10, height = 7)
```

### Weight

```{r echo = F, warning=FALSE}
# correlate plasma protein deltas with change in weight
plasma_soma_weight <- soma_corr(
  clinical_raw = attempt_dat,
  soma_raw     = soma,
  did_df       = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,
  analytes_info= analytes_attempt,
  clinical_var = "weight",
  feature_suffix = "",
  proper_name = "\u0394 Weight"
)

# correlation table
plasma_soma_weight$correlation_table

# plots
plasma_soma_weight$plot_all
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/Correlations/volcano_mixed_spearman_plasma_weight.png"),
       plasma_soma_weight$plot_all, width = 10, height = 7)
```

### PWV

```{r echo = F, warning=FALSE}
# correlate plasma protein deltas with change in pulse wave velocity
plasma_soma_PWV <- soma_corr(
  clinical_raw = attempt_dat,
  soma_raw     = soma,
  did_df       = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,
  analytes_info= analytes_attempt,
  clinical_var = "PWV",
  feature_suffix = "",
  proper_name = "\u0394 PWV",
  pre_visit = -4
)

# correlation table
plasma_soma_PWV$correlation_table

# plots
plasma_soma_PWV$plot_all
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/Correlations/volcano_mixed_spearman_plasma_PWV.png"),
       plasma_soma_PWV$plot_all, width = 10, height = 7)
```

### Cortical R2*

```{r echo = F, warning=FALSE}
# correlate plasma protein deltas with change in cortical R2* (renal oxygenation)
plasma_soma_avg_c_r2 <- soma_corr(
  clinical_raw = attempt_dat,
  soma_raw     = soma,
  did_df       = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,
  analytes_info= analytes_attempt,
  clinical_var = "avg_c_r2",
  feature_suffix = "",
  proper_name = "\u0394 Cortical R2*",
  pre_visit = -4
)

# correlation table
plasma_soma_avg_c_r2$correlation_table

# plots
plasma_soma_avg_c_r2$plot_all
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/Correlations/volcano_mixed_spearman_plasma_avg_c_r2.png"),
       plasma_soma_avg_c_r2$plot_all, width = 10, height = 7)
```

### Kidney R2*

```{r echo = F, warning=FALSE}
# correlate plasma protein deltas with change in kidney R2* (renal oxygenation)
plasma_soma_avg_k_r2 <- soma_corr(
  clinical_raw = attempt_dat,
  soma_raw     = soma,
  did_df       = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,
  analytes_info= analytes_attempt,
  clinical_var = "avg_k_r2",
  feature_suffix = "",
  proper_name = "\u0394 Kidney R2*",
  pre_visit = -4
)

# correlation table
plasma_soma_avg_k_r2$correlation_table

# plots
plasma_soma_avg_k_r2$plot_all
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/Correlations/volcano_mixed_spearman_plasma_avg_k_r2.png"),
       plasma_soma_avg_k_r2$plot_all, width = 10, height = 7)
```

# Integration with scRNA (results from Hyak)

```{r include = F}
# define cell type groupings for scRNA-seq integration
celltype_groups <- list(
  PT = c("PT-S1/S2", "PT-S3", "aPT"),
  TAL = c("C-TAL-1", "C-TAL-2", "aTAL", "dTAL"),
  PC = c("CCD-PC", "CNT-PC", "dCCD-PC", "M-PC", "tPC-IC"),
  EC = c("EC-AVR", "EC-GC", "EC-PTC", "EC-AEA", "EC-LYM", "EC/VSMC"),
  IC = c("IC-A", "IC-B", "aIC"),
  Immune = c("MAC", "MON", "cDC", "pDC", "CD4+ T", "CD8+ T", "B", "NK"),
  Immune_myeloid = c("MAC", "MON", "cDC", "pDC"),
  Immune_lymphoid = c("CD4+ T", "CD8+ T", "B", "NK"),
  VSMC_P_FIB = c("VSMC/P", "FIB"),
  POD = "POD",
  DCT = c("DCT", "dDCT"),  # Distal convoluted tubule
  CD = c("CCD-PC", "dCCD-PC", "CNT-PC", "tPC-IC", "MC", "aIC", "IC-A", "IC-B", "CNT"),  # Collecting duct & connecting tubule
  Glom  = c("POD", "MC", "M-PC"),
  VSMC        = c("VSMC/P", "EC/VSMC")
)

# Now add combined group
celltype_groups$Combined_p <- c(
  celltype_groups$EC,
  celltype_groups$Glom,
  celltype_groups$VSMC,
  celltype_groups$Immune
)

# read KPMP-reference nebula results per cell type group from local CSV
for (cell in names(celltype_groups))  {
  cell <- gsub("/", "_", cell)

  annotated_df <- read.csv(file.path(results_dir, "nebula", paste0(tolower(cell), "_kpmp_res.csv")))
  colnames(annotated_df) <- gsub("\\.", ":", colnames(annotated_df))
  cell <- gsub("-", "_", cell)
  cell <- gsub("\\+\\s", "_", cell)
  lower_cell <- tolower(cell)
  var_name <- paste0(lower_cell, "_kpmp")
  assign(var_name, annotated_df)
}
```


```{r echo = F}
# load VSMC transcript-plasma protein association results from nebula
vsmc_plasma_raw <- s3readRDS("Proteomics/vsmc_nebula_plasma_soma_res_kpmp.rds", "attempt", region = "")
vsmc_plasma <- process_nebula_results(vsmc_plasma_raw$results, pval_col = "p_log2(protein)")$results
vsmc_plasma <- vsmc_plasma %>%
  mutate(Gene = sub("_.*", "", Gene))
```

```{r echo = F}
# volcano plot for VSMC transcript-protein association and directional concordance
plot_volcano(vsmc_plasma,
             fc = "logFC_log2(protein)",
             p_col = "p_log2(protein)", 
             x_axis = "logFC log2(protein)", 
             y_axis = "-log10(p.value)",
             file_suffix = "_kpmp_vsmc_plasma",
             formula = "log2(protein) + treatment", cell_type = "VSMC",
             positive_text = "Positively associated\nwith transcript",
             negative_text = "Negatively associated\nwith transcript") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.2)

create_directional_volcano(
  rna_data = vsmc_kpmp,
  protein_data = vsmc_plasma,
  cell_type_name = "VSMC"
)
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/plasma_vsmc.png"))
  
```

```{r echo = F}
# assess VSMC transcript-protein directional concordance
vsmc_concordance_plasma <- concordance_by_celltype(
  biofluid_df = vsmc_plasma,
  scrna_df    = vsmc_kpmp,
  biofluid_label = "plasma",
  celltype = "VSMC",
  out_dir = file.path(results_dir, "Somascan/Transcript concordance")
)
```


```{r echo = F}
# load glomerular transcript-plasma protein association results from nebula
glom_plasma_raw <- s3readRDS("Proteomics/glom_nebula_plasma_soma_res_kpmp.rds", "attempt", region = "")
glom_plasma <- process_nebula_results(glom_plasma_raw$results, pval_col = "p_log2(protein)")$results
glom_plasma <- glom_plasma %>%
  mutate(Gene = sub("_.*", "", Gene))
```

```{r echo = F}
# volcano plot for glomerular transcript-protein association and directional concordance
plot_volcano(glom_plasma, fc = "logFC_log2(protein)", p_col = "p_log2(protein)", x_axis = "logFC log2(protein)", y_axis = "-log10(p.value)",
             file_suffix = "_kpmp_glom_plasma",
             formula = "log2(protein) + treatment", cell_type = "Glomerular cells",
             positive_text = "Positively associated\nwith transcript",
             negative_text = "Negatively associated\nwith transcript") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.2)

create_directional_volcano(
  rna_data = glom_kpmp,
  protein_data = glom_plasma,
  cell_type_name = "Glomerulus"
)
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/plasma_glom.png"))
```

```{r echo = F}
# assess glomerular transcript-protein directional concordance
glom_concordance_plasma <- concordance_by_celltype(
  biofluid_df = glom_plasma,
  scrna_df    = glom_kpmp,
  biofluid_label = "plasma",
  celltype = "Glom",
  out_dir = file.path(results_dir, "Somascan/Transcript concordance")
)
```

```{r echo = F}
# load immune cell transcript-plasma protein association results from nebula
immune_plasma_raw <- s3readRDS("Proteomics/immune_nebula_plasma_soma_res_kpmp.rds", "attempt", region = "")
immune_plasma <- process_nebula_results(immune_plasma_raw$results, pval_col = "p_log2(protein)")$results
immune_plasma <- immune_plasma %>%
  mutate(Gene = sub("_.*", "", Gene))
```

```{r echo = F}
# volcano plot for immune transcript-protein association and directional concordance
plot_volcano(immune_plasma, fc = "logFC_log2(protein)", p_col = "p_log2(protein)", x_axis = "logFC log2(protein)", y_axis = "-log10(p.value)", file_suffix = "_kpmp_immune_plasma",
             formula = "log2(protein) + treatment", cell_type = "Immune",
             positive_text = "Positively associated\nwith transcript",
             negative_text = "Negatively associated\nwith transcript") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.2)

create_directional_volcano(
  rna_data = immune_kpmp,
  protein_data = immune_plasma %>% filter(`logFC_log2(protein)` > -10),
  cell_type_name = "Immune"
)
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/plasma_immune.png"))
```

```{r echo = F}
# assess immune transcript-protein directional concordance
immune_concordance_plasma <- concordance_by_celltype(
  biofluid_df = immune_plasma,
  scrna_df    = immune_kpmp,
  biofluid_label = "plasma",
  celltype = "Immune",
  out_dir = file.path(results_dir, "Somascan/Transcript concordance")
)
```

```{r echo = F}
# load endothelial cell transcript-plasma protein association results from nebula
ec_plasma_raw <- s3readRDS("Proteomics/ec_nebula_plasma_soma_res_kpmp.rds", "attempt", region = "")
ec_plasma <- process_nebula_results(ec_plasma_raw$results, pval_col = "p_log2(protein)")$results
ec_plasma <- ec_plasma %>%
  mutate(Gene = sub("_.*", "", Gene))
```

```{r echo = F}
# volcano plot for EC transcript-protein association and directional concordance
plot_volcano(ec_plasma, fc = "logFC_log2(protein)", p_col = "p_log2(protein)", x_axis = "logFC log2(protein)", y_axis = "-log10(p.value)",
             file_suffix = "_kpmp_ec_plasma",
             formula = "log2(protein) + treatment", cell_type = "EC",
             positive_text = "Positively associated\nwith transcript",
             negative_text = "Negatively associated\nwith transcript") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.2)

create_directional_volcano(
  rna_data = ec_kpmp,
  protein_data = ec_plasma %>% filter(`logFC_log2(protein)` > -10),
  cell_type_name = "EC"
)
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/plasma_ec.png"))
```

```{r echo = F}
# assess EC transcript-protein directional concordance
ec_concordance_plasma <- concordance_by_celltype(
  biofluid_df = ec_plasma,
  scrna_df    = ec_kpmp,
  biofluid_label = "plasma",
  celltype = "EC",
  out_dir = file.path(results_dir, "Somascan/Transcript concordance")
)
```

```{r combinedho = F}
# load combined cell type (EC+VSMC+Immune+Glom) transcript-protein results
combined_plasma_raw <- s3readRDS("Proteomics/combined_nebula_plasma_soma_res_kpmp.rds", "attempt", region = "")
combined_plasma <- process_nebula_results(combined_plasma_raw$results, pval_col = "p_log2(protein)")$results
combined_plasma <- combined_plasma %>%
  mutate(Gene = sub("_.*", "", Gene))
```

```{r combinedho = F}
# volcano plot for combined cell type transcript-protein association and concordance
plot_volcano(combined_plasma, fc = "logFC_log2(protein)", p_col = "p_log2(protein)", x_axis = "logFC log2(protein)", y_axis = "-log10(p.value)",
             file_suffix = "_kpmp_combined_plasma",
             formula = "log2(protein) + treatment", 
             cell_type = "Combined (EC, VSMC, Immune, Glom)",
             positive_text = "Positively associated\nwith transcript",
             negative_text = "Negatively associated\nwith transcript") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, color = "grey", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.2)

create_directional_volcano(
  rna_data = combined_p_kpmp,
  protein_data = combined_plasma %>% filter(`logFC_log2(protein)` > -10),
  cell_type_name = "Combined (EC, VSMC, Immune, Glom)"
)
ggsave(file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Proteomics/Volcano Plots/plasma_combined.png"))
```

```{r echo = F}
# assess combined cell type transcript-protein directional concordance
combined_concordance_plasma <- concordance_by_celltype(
  biofluid_df = combined_plasma,
  scrna_df    = combined_p_kpmp,
  biofluid_label = "plasma",
  celltype = "Combined",
  out_dir = file.path(results_dir, "Somascan/Transcript concordance")
)
```

# Looking for overlap between treatment DiD & proteomics DiD

```{r echo = F}
# redefine cell type groups for treatment DiD overlap analysis
celltype_groups <- list(
  # PC              = c("CCD-PC", "CNT-PC", "dCCD-PC", "M-PC", "tPC-IC"),
  EC              = c("EC-AVR", "EC-GC", "EC-PTC", "EC-AEA", "EC-LYM", "EC/VSMC"),
  Immune          = c("MAC", "MON", "cDC", "pDC", "CD4+ T", "CD8+ T", "B", "NK"),
  Immune_myeloid  = c("MAC", "MON", "cDC", "pDC"),
  Immune_lymphoid = c("CD4+ T", "CD8+ T", "B", "NK"),
  VSMC_P_FIB      = c("VSMC/P", "FIB"),
  POD = c("POD")
)


# read grouped nebula DiD results for full gene set from S3
for (cell in names(celltype_groups))  {
  input_path <- paste0("grouped/", cell, "/ALL/nebula/", "grouped_", tolower(cell), "_kpmp_attempt_nebula_res_reml_pooled.rds")
  cell_df <- s3readRDS(input_path, bucket = "attempt", region = "")

  processed <- process_nebula_results(cell_df)
  lower_cell <- tolower(cell)
  var_name <- paste0(lower_cell, "_kpmp")

  assign(var_name, processed$results)
}

# reload plasma DiD mixed model results
did_res_plasma_mixed <- s3readRDS("Proteomics/plasma_proteomics_res.RDS", "attempt", region = "")
```

```{r echo = F}
# run batch concordance between plasma proteomics DiD and scRNA DiD across cell types
plasma_res <- batch_concordance_analysis(
  protein_data = did_res_plasma_mixed$results_annotated,  # This is correct
  transcript_data_list = list(EC = pt_kpmp, Immune = immune_kpmp, 
                              Immune_myeloid = immune_myeloid_kpmp,
                              Immune_lymphoid = immune_lymphoid_kpmp, 
                              VSMC_P_FIB = vsmc_p_fib_kpmp, POD = pod_kpmp),
  protein_source = 'plasma',
  output_dir = file.path(results_dir, "Figures/Pathways/enrichr")
)
```

# Organ Age

```{r}
# pass soma dataframe to python via reticulate for organ age estimation
library(reticulate)
py$soma <- soma
```

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from organage import OrganAge
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import re

# prepare metadata (age, sex) and protein matrix for OrganAge input
soma['Sex_F'] = (soma['sex'] == 'Female').astype(int)
soma['record_id_visit'] = soma['record_id'].astype(str) + '_' + soma['visit'].astype(str)
soma = soma.set_index('record_id_visit')

metadata_columns = ['age', 'Sex_F']
soma_md = soma[metadata_columns].copy()
soma_md = soma_md.rename(columns={'age': 'Age'})

# extract raw SomaScan protein columns and reformat IDs for OrganAge
seq_columns = [col for col in soma.columns if re.match(r'^seq\.\d+\.\d+', col) and '_' not in col]
soma_prot = soma[seq_columns].copy()
soma_prot.columns = soma_prot.columns.str.replace('seq.', '', regex=False).str.replace('.', '-', regex=False)

# estimate organ-specific biological ages using OrganAge (v5 11k panel)
data = OrganAge.CreateOrganAgeObject()
data.add_data(soma_md, soma_prot)
data.normalize(assay_version="v5")  #requires "v4" 5k, or "v4.1" 7k, or "v5" 11k
res = data.estimate_organ_ages()

# plot kidney-specific predicted vs chronological age colored by age gap z-score
toplot = res.loc[res.Organ=="Kidney"]
toplot = toplot.sort_values("Age")
sns.scatterplot(data=toplot, x="Age", y="Predicted_Age", 
                hue="AgeGap_zscored", palette='coolwarm', hue_norm=(-3,3))                
plt.plot(toplot.Age, toplot.yhat_lowess)
plt.show()
```
